title: Admin System Update Request
description: Request an update for the CURRENT instance. Intentionally has NO instance_id: the backend derives and verifies the instance identity server-side, so the browser can never target a different instance. additionalProperties:false rejects any instance_id (or other unknown field).

target_version.description: Version to update this instance to.

preflight_id.description: Id of the preflight the operator reviewed. The backend recomputes the preflight server-side regardless.

accepted_migration_risk.description: Operator acknowledgement required when the update carries destructive database migrations.

typed_confirmation.description: Optional typed confirmation string for high-risk updates.
